hero.title: Joshua Hong
hero.metaLine: Freshman | UTSA Men's Golf | NCAA Division I
hero.definition: High-reliability freshman scorer with immediate lineup value and upward transfer projection.
hero.supporting: Low-variance profile built on counting-round reliability, difficult-condition performance, and early win/top-end conversion at the Division I level.

quickSummary: Immediate lineup value with strong counting reliability and low volatility.
College-level proof already includes an individual win, three top-3 finishes, and five top-10s.
Profile holds under resistance and retains value when scoring conditions become more demanding.
Production is already real; trajectory still points higher in a stronger daily competitive setting.

metrics.label: Clippd Adjusted Avg
metrics.note: Division I scoring baseline with real lineup value.

metrics.label: Head-to-Head
metrics.note: 70.24% win rate across the full sample.

metrics.label: Top Finishes
metrics.note: Win, top-3, and top-10 volume across 10 freshman events.

stages.title: Immediate Division I Lineup Translation
stages.desc: Freshman season already produced a win, top-3 volume, and a high-reliability lineup profile.

stages.title: Back-to-Back Mexico Season Champion
stages.desc: Six consecutive wins and a second straight Mexico season title reinforced finishing ability, cumulative control, and long-form scoring value.

stages.title: Season Champion Before the Wins
stages.desc: The early profile separated through consistency, stability, and score accumulation before the win volume arrived.

points: Individual champion and only player under par in the field.
Proven scoring value in a resistance-heavy setup at TPC San Antonio.
Strong evidence of difficult-condition scoring value under resistance
Added team-title contribution under real separation pressure.
Led UTSA to a team runner-up finish, reinforcing scoring ceiling and conversion value
Fall reflected a normal freshman adjustment phase: 9–12–24–55.
Spring produced a 3–1–3–48–10–63 sequence, including a win and multiple top finishes.
Full-season value is now defined by repeat result volume, not a one-week spike.
The overall profile is still defined more by progression and repeat result volume than by any single week

evidenceProjection.projectedRoleBody: Immediate lineup option with dependable travel-roster value, strong counting reliability, and room to scale in a stronger competitive environment.
evidenceProjection.translationText: Reliable counting-round addition with value beyond baseline lineup stability.
evidenceProjection.developmentText: Upward scoring trend and repeated low-round evidence suggest additional growth under deeper fields and stronger daily pressure.

transferObjective.body: Pursuing the next competitive step through deeper fields, expanded high-level tournament exposure, and a development environment aligned with long-term professional goals and the PGA U pathway.
transferObjective.noteText: Appreciative of the growth and opportunities provided within the current program, while recognizing that the next stage of development may be better served in a different performance environment.
